'''zamuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:poboy|poboy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-m-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:poboy|poboy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zamuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæmiwith|zæmiwith]] || [[word:zæmiwij|zæmiwij]] || [[word:zæmiwish|zæmiwish]] || [[word:zæmiwi|zæmiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zamumuwuth|zamumuwuth]] || [[word:zamumuwuj|zamumuwuj]] || [[word:zamumuwush|zamumuwush]] || [[word:zamumuwu|zamumuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zamuwuth|zamuwuth]] || [[word:zamuwuj|zamuwuj]] || [[word:zamuwush|zamuwush]] || [[word:zamuwu|zamuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zamufwuth|zamufwuth]] || [[word:zamufwuj|zamufwuj]] || [[word:zamufwush|zamufwush]] || [[word:zamufwuf|zamufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zamuwuthu|zamuwuthu]] || [[word:zamuwuju|zamuwuju]] || [[word:zamuwushu|zamuwushu]] || [[word:zamuwuku|zamuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zamuwuth|zamuwuth]] || [[word:zamuwuj|zamuwuj]] || [[word:zamuwush|zamuwush]] || [[word:zamuwu|zamuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zamuwuthul|zamuwuthul]] || [[word:zamuwujul|zamuwujul]] || [[word:zamuwushul|zamuwushul]] || [[word:zamuwukul|zamuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zamuwuthuthu|zamuwuthuthu]] || [[word:zamuwujuju|zamuwujuju]] || [[word:zamuwushushu|zamuwushushu]] || [[word:zamuwuku|zamuwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zamuwuthun|zamuwuthun]] || [[word:zamuwujun|zamuwujun]] || [[word:zamuwushun|zamuwushun]] || [[word:zamuwukun|zamuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zamuwuthuoro|zamuwuthuoro]] || [[word:zamuwujuoro|zamuwujuoro]] || [[word:zamuwushuoro|zamuwushuoro]] || [[word:zamuwukuoro|zamuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
